text.title: Agent-Builder Community Rituals Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agent-Builder Community Rituals output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: ritual produces no artefact for ≥3 consecutive sessions
public_log gaps >2 weeks while rituals are running
single host runs >8 consecutive sessions without rotation

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: ritual_calendar populated with a typed value
artefact_templates populated with a typed value
public_log_path populated with a typed value
hosts_rotation populated with a typed value
retention_metric populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
